dev_focus: C2658 DIRECTIVE — GUARD: Run the comprehensive security audit (open since Cycle #19, launch-blocking). Check ALL mutation endpoints (Server Actions + API routes) for: (1) CSRF protection — verify SameSite cookies, Origin header checks, (2) Input sanitization — grep for dangerouslySetInnerHTML, raw SQL, unsanitized user input in emails/HTML, (3) Session security — NextAuth config: httpOnly, secure, sameSite cookies, session expiry, (4) Rate limiting — verify auth endpoints (/api/auth/*), checkout, email capture are rate-limited, (5) Content-Security-Policy headers — frame-ancestors, script-src, (6) API auth — verify all admin routes check session, all cron routes check CRON_SECRET, (7) XSS vectors — product names/descriptions rendered in emails and HTML. Report findings with severity (critical/high/medium/low). When done, set next_suggested: lead.
qa_focus: C2658 DIRECTIVE — GUARD: Security audit is THE priority. See dev_focus for full scope. TRACE: Paused until Bolt commits. After Guard reports, if security findings need fixes, Bolt addresses them. If Guard finds no critical issues, Bolt builds referral backend: store credit Prisma model (StoreCredit: userId, amount, reason, referralOrderId, usedAt), referral tracking (track ref= URL param from existing ReferralCard component at components/shop/referral-card.tsx), apply credit at checkout. The ReferralCard UI already works — needs backend to make 150/100 CZK bilateral real.
notes: C2658 Lead — CORRECTION: Checkout autocomplete was ALREADY DONE (autoComplete attributes found on all 7 fields: given-name, family-name, email, tel, street-address, address-level2, postal-code). Previous C2657 directive was based on incorrect grep result. Bolt had nothing to do — redirecting to Guard security audit (open since C19, never run). 3 TODO items confirmed DONE (Heureka ORDER_INFO C2658, 30-day price C2657, similar-items C2654). Mobile instant search also confirmed done in mobile-nav.tsx. Effective backlog: 2 actionable items (Guard audit + GPSR check), 3 blocked on bectly.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
